description_long: This chair features a minimalist Scandinavian-inspired design with a light-colored wooden frame and a seat and backrest made from rich brown leather or faux leather. The backrest is slightly curved for ergonomic support and includes two horizontal cutouts, adding a modern touch. The seat is flat and taut, supported by the sturdy wooden frame, and the back of the chair reveals leather straps that secure the backrest in place. The legs are straight and cylindrical, with crossbars for additional stability. The overall construction suggests a blend of comfort and durability, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings. The materials and craftsmanship indicate a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A modern chair with a light wood frame and brown leather seat and backrest, featuring cutout details and leather strap supports. Its clean lines and sturdy build make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved brown leather backrest with cutouts and the flat leather seat supported by a light wood frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the cylindrical wooden legs and crossbars.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the leather straps securing the backrest and the full width of the back support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the seat's flatness and the frame's construction.
